name: @machine/activation-capacitor
description: Capacitor (Android) runtime adapter for @machine/activation-sdk. Bridges the LiteRT-LM native plugin to the activation runtime contract.
author: Machine AI Contributors

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.esm.json && node ./scripts/finalize-esm-build.js
scripts.test:build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
